timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.
title: D-Day landings take place

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.
title: Paris is liberated
description: Allied forces and the French Resistance liberate Paris from German occupation.

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.
title: Yalta Conference opens

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict
timeline_description: Major military and political events of World War II from the invasion of Poland to Japan's surrender.

timeline_title: Timeline of World War II Global Conflict

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Constantinople is dedicated
description: Emperor Constantine I formally dedicates Constantinople as the new imperial capital.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Roman Empire is permanently divided
description: After the death of Theodosius I, the eastern Roman Empire continues under separate rule, forming the Byzantine state.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Visigoths sack Rome
description: The sack of Rome underscores the growing importance of the eastern empire as the west weakens.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Western Roman Empire falls
description: The deposition of Romulus Augustulus leaves the eastern empire as the main Roman imperial continuation.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Justinian I becomes emperor
description: Justinian I begins a reign marked by reconquest, legal reform, and monumental building.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Nika Revolt shakes Constantinople
description: A major urban uprising threatens Justinian's rule before being violently suppressed.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Hagia Sophia is completed
description: The new Hagia Sophia is dedicated, becoming the empire's greatest church and architectural symbol.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Justinianic Plague begins
description: A devastating plague reaches the empire and contributes to long-term demographic and fiscal strain.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Justinian's reconquests reach their height
description: By the mid-550s Byzantine forces have recovered Italy and other western territories.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Heraclius takes the throne
description: Heraclius becomes emperor and later reorganizes the empire during a period of intense warfare.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Byzantines are defeated at Yarmouk
description: The defeat by Arab forces accelerates the loss of Syria and the empire's eastern provinces.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Second Arab siege of Constantinople begins
description: Arab forces besiege Constantinople, but the city survives and preserves the empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.

description: Imperial policy turns against religious images, beginning a long theological and political conflict.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Veneration of icons is restored
description: The end of iconoclasm is celebrated in the Byzantine church as the Triumph of Orthodoxy.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Great Schism deepens division with Rome
description: The schism between the eastern and western churches formalizes a long-running religious split.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Byzantines lose the Battle of Manzikert
description: Defeat by the Seljuk Turks opens much of Anatolia to Turkish control.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Alexios I Komnenos becomes emperor
description: Alexios I begins the Komnenian restoration after a period of military and political crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Fourth Crusade captures Constantinople
description: Crusaders sack Constantinople and establish a Latin Empire, shattering Byzantine power.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Byzantines recover Constantinople
description: Michael VIII Palaiologos restores Byzantine rule in Constantinople.

timeline_title: Timeline of Byzantine Imperial History
timeline_description: Chronological milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire from Constantinople's foundation to its fall.
title: Constantinople falls to the Ottomans
description: Ottoman forces capture Constantinople, ending the Byzantine Empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of Islamic Civilization History

title: Mongols sack Baghdad

timeline_title: Timeline of Islamic Civilization History

timeline_title: Timeline of Islamic Civilization History

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era

description: Britain's victory leaves it with new debts and imperial responsibilities that reshape colonial policy.

timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.

description: Parliament imposes a direct tax on printed materials in the colonies, provoking widespread resistance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Stamp Act is repealed
description: Parliament repeals the Stamp Act but asserts continued authority over the colonies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Townshend Acts are enacted
description: New import duties renew colonial protests over taxation and imperial power.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Boston Massacre occurs
description: British troops kill five civilians in Boston, intensifying anti-British feeling.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Boston Tea Party takes place
description: Colonists dump tea into Boston Harbor to protest imperial taxation and monopoly.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.

description: Colonial delegates gather to coordinate a response to British policy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.

description: Fighting between British troops and colonial militia begins the armed conflict.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Second Continental Congress convenes
description: Delegates assume a central political role and move toward coordinated war leadership.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Battle of Bunker Hill is fought
description: A costly British victory demonstrates colonial resistance and determination.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: George Washington takes command
description: Washington assumes command of the Continental Army.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Common Sense is published
description: Thomas Paine's pamphlet powerfully argues for independence.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: British surrender at Saratoga
description: The American victory at Saratoga helps secure French support.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: France allies with the United States
description: France formally recognizes the United States and enters the war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: British army surrenders at Yorktown
description: Cornwallis's surrender at Yorktown effectively ends major fighting.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Treaty of Paris is signed
description: Britain recognizes the independence of the United States.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: Constitutional Convention meets
description: Delegates draft a new federal constitution to replace the Articles of Confederation framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the American Revolutionary Era
timeline_description: Key causes, turning points, and political outcomes of the American Revolution.
title: U.S. Constitution takes effect
description: The new constitutional government begins operation, shaping the revolution's political legacy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict

description: A separate government is proclaimed in the south under Syngman Rhee.

title: Democratic People's Republic of Korea is proclaimed

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.

description: The United Nations calls on member states to assist South Korea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict

title: Seoul falls to North Korean forces
description: North Korean troops capture Seoul in the opening days of the war.

description: UN and South Korean forces hold a shrinking defensive line in southeastern Korea.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.

description: UN forces under MacArthur land at Inchon and reverse the course of the war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.

description: UN and South Korean forces retake Seoul from North Korea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.

description: South Korean and UN forces advance into North Korea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.
title: Pyongyang falls to UN forces

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.
title: Chinese forces enter the war
description: Chinese People's Volunteers begin major intervention on North Korea's side.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.
title: Battle of Chosin Reservoir begins
description: UN forces fight a major battle during the Chinese counteroffensive.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.
title: Seoul falls again
description: Chinese and North Korean forces retake Seoul.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.
title: UN forces retake Seoul
description: The front stabilizes after UN forces recover the South Korean capital once more.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.
title: Armistice talks begin
description: Negotiations start while fighting continues near the front.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict
timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political events of the Korean War and its immediate aftermath.

description: Eisenhower campaigns on ending the war and wins the U.S. presidency.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict

timeline_title: Timeline of the Korean War Conflict

timeline_title: Timeline of Television History Worldwide
timeline_description: Major technical and broadcasting milestones in the history of television.
title: U.S. full-power television switches to digital broadcasting
description: The United States completes its full-power transition from analog to digital television.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: South African Native National Congress is founded
description: The organization later known as the ANC is founded to oppose racial discrimination.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: ANC Youth League is formed
description: A younger generation of activists forms the ANC Youth League and presses for mass action.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: National Party wins election
description: The National Party comes to power and formalizes apartheid as state policy.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Population Registration Act is passed
description: The apartheid government codifies racial classification in law.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Group Areas Act is enacted
description: The law enforces residential segregation and large-scale removals.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Defiance Campaign begins
description: The ANC and allies launch a major campaign of nonviolent resistance.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Freedom Charter is adopted
description: The Congress of the People adopts the Freedom Charter at Kliptown.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Women's March protests pass laws
description: Thousands of women march to the Union Buildings against pass laws.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Sharpeville massacre occurs
description: Police kill demonstrators protesting pass laws, transforming domestic and global opposition to apartheid.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: ANC and PAC are banned
description: The government outlaws major Black political organizations after Sharpeville.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: South Africa becomes a republic
description: South Africa leaves the Commonwealth and becomes a republic amid rising isolation.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Umkhonto we Sizwe is formed
description: The ANC's armed wing is founded after the turn away from exclusive nonviolence.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Mandela and Rivonia defendants are sentenced
description: Nelson Mandela and other anti-apartheid leaders receive life sentences at the Rivonia Trial.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Soweto uprising begins
description: Student protests against Afrikaans instruction ignite a nationwide revolt.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Steve Biko dies in police custody
description: The death of Black Consciousness leader Steve Biko becomes an international scandal.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: United Democratic Front is launched
description: The UDF unites internal anti-apartheid organizations against the regime.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: State of emergency is declared
description: The government responds to escalating unrest with sweeping emergency powers.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Nelson Mandela is released
description: Mandela is freed from prison after 27 years, opening a new phase of negotiations.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: Core apartheid laws are repealed
description: Parliament repeals key apartheid legislation as negotiations continue.

timeline_title: Timeline of South African Anti-Apartheid Struggle
timeline_description: Major milestones in the struggle against apartheid in South Africa.
title: South Africa holds its first democratic election
description: The country's first all-race election brings apartheid to a formal end.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Jomon culture begins
description: Early Jomon cultural settlements are firmly attested in the Japanese archipelago by the late 4th to 3rd millennium BCE.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Yayoi culture emerges
description: Wet-rice agriculture and new technologies spread during the Yayoi period.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Kofun period begins
description: Powerful elites build large tomb mounds as early state formation advances.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Buddhism is introduced to Japan
description: Buddhism enters Japan and becomes a major force in religion, politics, and art.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Nara becomes imperial capital
description: The court establishes a permanent capital at Nara.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Heian period begins
description: The capital moves to Heian-kyo, inaugurating the Heian period.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Minamoto victory ends the Genpei War
description: Minamoto no Yoritomo's triumph clears the way for warrior government.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Kamakura shogunate is established
description: Minamoto no Yoritomo becomes shogun and founds the Kamakura bakufu.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: First Mongol invasion of Japan
description: Mongol-led forces attack Japan but fail to secure conquest.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Second Mongol invasion fails
description: A larger Mongol attempt to conquer Japan is defeated.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Ashikaga shogunate begins
description: Ashikaga Takauji establishes a new military government in Kyoto.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Onin War begins
description: The Onin War ushers in the long age of regional conflict known as the Sengoku period.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Portuguese arrive in Japan
description: The arrival of the Portuguese opens a new phase of contact with Europe.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Tokugawa wins the Battle of Sekigahara
description: Tokugawa Ieyasu's victory establishes the foundations of Tokugawa rule.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Tokugawa shogunate is founded
description: Tokugawa Ieyasu becomes shogun and inaugurates the Edo period.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Commodore Perry arrives
description: U.S. naval pressure challenges Japan's long policy of restricted foreign contact.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Meiji Restoration begins
description: The Tokugawa shogunate collapses and imperial rule is restored.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Meiji Constitution is promulgated
description: Japan establishes a modern constitutional framework under imperial sovereignty.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Postwar constitution takes effect
description: Japan's new constitution takes effect under Allied occupation.

timeline_title: Timeline of Japanese Historical Development
timeline_description: Major political, cultural, and social turning points in Japanese history from prehistory to the modern state.
title: Occupation of Japan ends
description: The Allied occupation formally ends and Japan regains full sovereignty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Portugal captures Ceuta
description: Portugal's capture of Ceuta helps launch its Atlantic and African expansion.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Madeira is colonized by the Portuguese
description: Portuguese settlement of Madeira strengthens Atlantic navigation and expansion.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Gil Eanes rounds Cape Bojador
description: The voyage breaks a psychological barrier for Portuguese navigation along Africa.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Bartolomeu Dias rounds the Cape of Good Hope
description: Dias proves that the Atlantic and Indian oceans are connected by sea.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Columbus reaches the Americas
description: Christopher Columbus's transatlantic voyage links Europe and the Americas in a new imperial era.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Treaty of Tordesillas is signed
description: Spain and Portugal divide overseas spheres of exploration and conquest.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: John Cabot reaches North America
description: Cabot's voyage opens an English claim to parts of North America.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Vasco da Gama sails for India
description: Vasco da Gama sets out on the voyage that will establish a sea route from Europe to India.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Vasco da Gama reaches Calicut
description: The Portuguese complete a direct sea voyage from Europe to India.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Cabral reaches Brazil
description: Pedro Alvares Cabral lands on the Brazilian coast during a Portuguese voyage.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Portuguese seize Malacca
description: Portugal secures a crucial chokepoint for trade into the East Indies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Balboa reaches the Pacific
description: Vasco Nunez de Balboa crosses the Isthmus of Panama and sights the Pacific Ocean.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Magellan expedition departs Spain
description: The expedition begins the voyage that will achieve the first circumnavigation of the globe.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Magellan reaches the Philippines and dies
description: The expedition crosses the Pacific, though Magellan is killed in the Philippines.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: First circumnavigation is completed
description: The Victoria returns to Spain under Juan Sebastian del Cano, completing the first circumnavigation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Jacques Cartier begins voyages to Canada
description: Cartier's expeditions expand French claims in North America.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Francis Drake begins circumnavigation
description: Drake's voyage strengthens England's maritime ambitions and prestige.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Dutch East India Company is founded
description: The VOC becomes a major engine of Dutch overseas exploration and commerce.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: Abel Tasman reaches Tasmania and New Zealand
description: Dutch exploration extends European geographic knowledge of the South Pacific.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Global Age of Exploration
timeline_description: Major voyages, discoveries, and imperial milestones in the Age of Exploration.
title: James Cook charts eastern Australia
description: Cook's voyage marks a late culmination of the great age of European oceanic exploration.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: AT&T launches mobile telephone service
description: AT&T introduces mobile telephone service for vehicles, an early precursor of the mobile phone era.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Cellular concept is proposed
description: Engineers at Bell Labs outline the cellular network concept that will underpin modern mobile telephony.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Improved mobile service expands in cars
description: New mobile systems improve spectrum use and service quality for vehicle telephony.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: First handheld mobile phone call is made
description: Motorola engineer Martin Cooper makes a widely recognized first handheld cellular phone call.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: First commercial cellular network launches
description: Japan launches the first commercial cellular telephone network.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Nordic countries launch NMT service
description: The Nordic Mobile Telephone system becomes an important early multinational cellular network.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: 1G cellular service begins in the United States
description: Commercial analog cellular service begins in the United States.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Motorola DynaTAC 8000X is introduced
description: The DynaTAC becomes the first commercially available handheld cellular phone.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: First GSM network launches
description: The first GSM network goes live in Finland, accelerating the digital mobile era.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: First SMS text message is sent
description: The first SMS message is sent over a GSM network.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: IBM Simon reaches the market
description: IBM Simon combines telephony and computing features and is often described as an early smartphone.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Motorola StarTAC is released
description: The compact StarTAC becomes an influential consumer mobile phone design.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Nokia leads global handset market
description: Nokia's rise marks the mass-market expansion of consumer mobile phones.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: NTT DoCoMo launches i-mode
description: I-mode popularizes mobile internet services on a large scale in Japan.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: First commercial 3G networks launch
description: Commercial 3G services begin, enabling faster mobile data transmission.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Apple unveils the iPhone
description: Apple introduces the iPhone, reshaping the smartphone market and mobile software design.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: First Android phone is released
description: The HTC Dream launches as the first commercially released Android smartphone.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: 4G era begins to emerge
description: The transition toward fourth-generation mobile networks begins in commercial markets.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Mobile apps become central to smartphone use
description: Rapid growth of app ecosystems transforms the phone into a dominant general-purpose personal device.

timeline_title: Timeline of Mobile Phone Development
timeline_description: Major technical, commercial, and consumer milestones in the history of mobile phones.
title: Commercial 5G networks begin rolling out
description: Major carriers begin deploying commercial 5G services, marking a new mobile network generation.
